The '''Agr''' was a red-colored predatory bird native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It was the namesake of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Agr (starfighter)|Agr]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].

{{Creature-stub}}
